author: @roninbauer8651

text:
Hulk2k6 I'm gonna be REAL honest, and just so you know, I'm NOT condoning rape and/or sexual harassment in ANY way, but this had a pretty mean-spirited vibe towards the end, the way Amy gives that "u dead now boi" look at red shirt, Thomas' overly menacing knuckle crack, Red Shirt's look of pure fear as Thomas reaches for his ass, and DON'T get me started on Amy's (thankfully aborted) knee to crotch maneuver. Worst part is that poor sap probably didn't even get anywhere relationship-wise aside from Amy when you think about it AND given his pretty unlawful approach at "flirting". 

So yeah, thanks, Eric Schwartz, for giving us a scummy character who probably had potential as a love interest at some point, but came a cropper as a sex-crazed lowlife. 

P.S I never read Sabrina or any of its franchise, don't judge me for that.
